intended_use: RSI-MRI+ is indicated for use as automatic post-acquisition image processing software for analysis of diffusion-weighted and anatomical magnetic resonance imaging data. RSI-MRI+ is intended for automa
intended_use_full: RSI-MRI+ is indicated for use as automatic post-acquisition image processing software for analysis of diffusion-weighted and anatomical magnetic resonance imaging data. RSI-MRI+ is intended for automatic fusion of derived diffusion-weighted MRI data with anatomical T2-weighted MR images. RSI-MRI+ is additionally intended to provide automatic prostate segmentation, quantification, and reporting of derived image metrics.
ground_truth: Manual radiologist segmentations for segmentation accuracy validation; professionally labeled regions-of-interest from retrospective clinical data
other_metrics: Performance testing included: (1) Increased conspicuity of RSI-MRI+ Restricted Signal Map compared to standard DWI maps in regions of restricted diffusion; (2) Accuracy of automated segmentation compared to manual radiologist segmentations; (3) Diffusion signal normalization across acquisitions and scanners
